videos.title: HTML Select Element Tutorial
videos.description: Complete guide to the HTML select element including options, optgroups, and styling.

videos.title: Custom Select Dropdown CSS
videos.description: Learn how to style select dropdowns with custom CSS and create custom dropdown components.

videos.title: HTML Forms - Select and Options
videos.description: HTML forms tutorial covering select elements, options, and optgroups in detail.

videos.title: Accessible Custom Dropdown Components
videos.description: Build accessible custom dropdown components with proper ARIA attributes and keyboard navigation.

videos.title: Dynamic Cascading Selects
videos.description: Implement cascading/dependent selects with JavaScript for country-state-city patterns.
